item.title: 全世界第一個發明汽車的公司 德國國產車的博物館是這樣蓋的！【超認真少年】Benz Museum Feat.德國百靈BRAUN
item.itunes:title: 全世界第一個發明汽車的公司 德國國產車的博物館是這樣蓋的！【超認真少年】Benz Museum Feat.德國百靈BRAUN
item.itunes:author: 超認真少年Imserious
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zE_8FXfDr9Y 📍Latest News/Partnership Information: https://portaly.cc/imserious 【Popular Videos】 \"Air Compressor\" - Basic demonstration tutorial, turns out everyone needs an air compressor at home. How to use Air compressor https://youtu.be/Wghd4LpM6DE Understanding CNC Basics! Unboxing a multi-million-dollar CNC machine from Germany! Taichung Precision Machinery [Hidden Factory] What's CNC? https://youtu.be/KZ0lIzlYHw4 Even selling to daughters at hardware stores? Taiwan Hardware Store Guide https://youtu.be/_Y0jLEeENp8 Daughter-in-law marrying in! Which company offers the highest salary, digging seriously? Revealed! Machine Tool Exhibition Part 2 [imserious] https://youtu.be/f0lWUPiUDnw Surprise marriage entry second wave! Father-in-law takes away the daughter to see the future big business [imserious] KITAGAWA Machine Tool \u0026 Chuck https://youtu.be/47cGn20vv5s
